Class TvEpisodeSearchResult

java.lang.Object
com.amilesend.tmdb.client.model.Resource<Integer, TvEpisode>
com.amilesend.tmdb.client.model.NamedResource<Integer, TvEpisode>
com.amilesend.tmdb.client.model.tv.episodes.type.TvEpisode
com.amilesend.tmdb.client.model.find.type.TvEpisodeSearchResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
SearchResult
public class TvEpisodeSearchResult extends TvEpisode implements SearchResult
Describes a TV episode search result.
